$comment: Presentation document for the managed-namespace chart. The chart provisions its own namespace (namespace, resource quotas, optional subnet), so there is no separate destination namespace to pick: the order's "namespace" directive sources destination.namespace from the chart's own namespace.namespaceName value (source=values) and hides the order form's Namespace input (hideOrderField). The user types the namespace name once, in the namespaceName field. The defaults block stamps namespace.creator=console at order time (the chart defaults it to lk for non-console deploys).

order.$comment: identity = the namespace name (locks the deploy identity and service_name). namespace (object form) = destination.namespace comes from that same values field, and the order form's Namespace input is hidden - the chart renders into the namespace it creates.
